allow: WebSearch
WebFetch(domain:www.gharchive.org)
WebFetch(domain:github.com)
WebFetch(domain:docs.github.com)

Bash(cd D:/GitHub_simulation && python -c "from github_agent_sim.config.settings import Settings; s = Settings\(data_dir='D:/GitHub_simulation/data'\); print\('Settings OK'\); print\(f'Data dir: {s.data_dir}'\); print\(f'DB URL: {s.database_url}'\)")
Bash(cd D:/GitHub_simulation && pip install -e . 2>&1 | tail -20)

Bash(cd D:/GitHub_simulation && python -c "
from github_agent_sim.config.settings import Settings
from github_agent_sim.agents import ContributorAgent, MaintainerAgent, ReviewerAgent, BotAgent
from github_agent_sim.simulation.git_sandbox import GitSandbox
from github_agent_sim.simulation.event_bus import EventBus, get_event_bus
from github_agent_sim.simulation.message_queue import MessageQueue, MentionSystem

print\('✓ All modules imported successfully!'\)
print\(\)
print\('Available components:'\)
print\('  - Settings \(config\)'\)
print\('  - ContributorAgent, MaintainerAgent, ReviewerAgent, BotAgent \(agents\)'\)
print\('  - GitSandbox \(simulation\)'\)
print\('  - EventBus \(simulation\)'\)
print\('  - MessageQueue, MentionSystem \(simulation\)'\)
")

Bash(cd D:/GitHub_simulation && python -c "
from github_agent_sim.config.settings import Settings
from github_agent_sim.agents import ContributorAgent, MaintainerAgent, ReviewerAgent, BotAgent
from github_agent_sim.simulation.git_sandbox import GitSandbox
from github_agent_sim.simulation.event_bus import EventBus, get_event_bus
from github_agent_sim.simulation.message_queue import MessageQueue, MentionSystem

print\('[OK] All modules imported successfully!'\)
print\(\)
print\('Available components:'\)
print\('  - Settings \(config\)'\)
print\('  - ContributorAgent, MaintainerAgent, ReviewerAgent, BotAgent \(agents\)'\)
print\('  - GitSandbox \(simulation\)'\)
print\('  - EventBus \(simulation\)'\)
print\('  - MessageQueue, MentionSystem \(simulation\)'\)
")
Bash(cd D:/GitHub_simulation && python -m pytest tests/ -v --tb=short 2>&1 | head -80)
Bash(cd D:/GitHub_simulation && python examples/run_simulation.py 2>&1)
Bash(cd D:/GitHub_simulation && sed -i 's/✓/[OK]/g' examples/run_simulation.py && sed -i 's/→/  ->/g' examples/run_simulation.py)
Bash(python -c "import sys; print\('Python:', sys.executable\); print\('Prefix:', sys.prefix\); print\('Base:', sys.base_prefix\)")
Bash(pip show:*)
Bash(cd D:/GitHub_simulation && uv venv)
Bash(cd D:/GitHub_simulation && python -m venv .venv)
Bash(cd D:/GitHub_simulation && .venv/Scripts/activate && pip install -e ".[dev,analysis]" 2>&1 | tail -30)
Bash(cd D:/GitHub_simulation && .venv/Scripts/activate && python -c "import sys; print\('Python:', sys.executable\); print\('Virtual Env:', sys.prefix != sys.base_prefix\)")
Bash(cd D:/GitHub_simulation && .venv/Scripts/activate && python -c "import sys; print\('Python:', sys.executable\); print\('Is Virtual Env:', sys.prefix != sys.base_prefix\)")
Bash(cd D:/GitHub_simulation && .venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import sys; print\('Python:', sys.executable\); venv = sys.prefix != sys.base_prefix; print\('Is Virtual Env:', venv\)")
Bash(cd D:/GitHub_simulation && .venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import sys; print\('Python:', sys.executable\); print\('Prefix:', sys.prefix\)")
Bash(cd D:/GitHub_simulation && gh repo create fuxingtamu/github-agents-sim --public --source=. --description="GitHub 开发者行为多智能体模拟系统 - AI Agent Simulation for GitHub Developer Behavior" --push)
